paths.name: lucide-react
paths.message: Use the Icon component (@/components/common/Icon) for all icons. Add missing icons to its map.

paths.name: @phosphor-icons/react
paths.message: Use the Icon component (@/components/common/Icon). Add a missing icon to its phosphorIcons map instead of importing directly.

paths.name: @/types/nuon-oapi-v3
paths.message: Never import generated OpenAPI types directly. Extract the type in @/types/ctl-api.types and import from there.

paths.name: react-router
paths.message: Use Link from @/components/common/Link (href, not to). For nav buttons use Button with href and variant="ghost".

paths.name: @/components/surfaces/Modal
paths.message: Use Modal, not ModalBase. See the Modal/Panel pattern in AGENTS.md.

paths.name: @/components/surfaces/Panel
paths.message: Use Panel, not PanelBase. See the Modal/Panel pattern in AGENTS.md.

patterns.message: Use the Icon component (@/components/common/Icon) for all icons.
Use the Icon component (@/components/common/Icon). Add brand icons to its customIcons map instead of importing directly.
